title: Pentacalia krukoffii
intro: Pentacalia krukoffii is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae, commonly known as the pentacalia or Pentacalia genus. The plant has been studied for its potential health benefits, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, making it a promising natural remedy for various health conditions. The bioactive constituents of Pentacalia krukoffii include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and sesquiterpenoids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. In traditional medicine, Pentacalia krukoffii is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, which are used to treat various ailments, including digestive issues, respiratory problems, and wounds.

The species is considered a rare and lesser-known member of the Asteraceae family.
